privileged_info_summary: The target expected values for the WordPress site title ('Wikimedia Foundation News'), tagline ('News and updates from the Wikimedia Foundation'), administration email ('press@wikimedia.org'), and new page title ('Press Resources') exactly match the instructions provided in the task description and are explicitly evaluated via the WordPress CLI in export_result.sh. The image asset paths for the logo and icon are explicitly defined in the prompt and their generation (via Wikimedia Commons download or ImageMagick fallback) is confirmed in setup_task.sh.
